name: HRW_ENTERPRISES
description: An Enterprise Configuration Enterprise contains information for the enterprise defined within an Enterprise Configuration. An enterprise is a collection of companies and or other legal entities recognized in law that are under common control. An enterprise is the high-level container for all data in the Fusion application.

columns.Name: ENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for the HRW_ENTERPRISES table

columns.Name: CONFIGURATION_ID
columns.Comments: CONFIGURATION_ID

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: NAME

columns.Name: SHORT_NAME
columns.Comments: SHORT_NAME

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_NAME
columns.Comments: SAVE THE NAME ON LOADING

columns.Name: PRIMARY_INDUSTRY
columns.Comments: PRIMARY_INDUSTRY

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_OPTION
columns.Comments: BUSINESS_UNIT_OPTION

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: LOCATION_ID

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: SAVE LOCATION ID ON LOADING

columns.Name: WORKER_NUMBER_GENERATION
columns.Comments: Worker Number Generation Method

columns.Name: EMPLOYMENT_MODEL
columns.Comments: Employment Model

columns.Name: ALLOW_EMP_TERMS_OVERRIDE
columns.Comments: Allow Employment Terms Override at Assignment flag

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
